sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Eight-Directional Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player has free eight-directional movement in top-down view, rather than traditional platformer left-right movement

special_mechanics.name: Partner Possession (Magic)
special_mechanics.description: Main character (Pocky) can possess partner character to temporarily control their body and use unique abilities

special_mechanics.name: Partner Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Pocky can throw Player 2's character at enemies for massive damage; thrown character temporarily dies

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources document game structure, characters, and gameplay mechanics but contain no specific physics parameters, movement values, or sub-pixel system information. Game is a top-down shoot 'em up with free eight-directional movement, not a traditional platformer with gravity-based jump physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Pocky & Rocky 2
